action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 8 with combined train+val, mixup, label smoothing, cosine schedule for 4 epochs got 0.7879 (new best, +0.014 over previous). Analysis: Combined data + regularization helps. Now want to push higher: (1) try CLIP ViT-B/16 with same recipe (stronger backbone), (2) ensemble multiple models, (3) more epochs but with strong regularization. With 4.7h left and ~3 min/run, I have budget to try several. Let me try CLIP ViT-B/16 with proper recipe (mixup + LS + combined data + 4-5 epochs). CLIP features are very strong on CIFAR. Decision: Train CLIP ViT-B/16 with same recipe. Save checkpoint, eval. If better, ensemble with ConvNeXt.
